steps.title: Connect the added plant function
steps.content: The passage lists two related functions of guard cells: they regulate carbon dioxide intake, and they regulate water loss. The blank therefore needs a transition that adds a second, parallel function.

steps.title: Reject the wrong signals
steps.content: Choice B gives a time signal, but the sentence is not about something that happened earlier. Choice C signals a conclusion, not an added function. Choice D signals contrast, but the two functions work together. The answer is A.
